text.title: Backup Strategies (3-2-1-1-0) Examples
text.summary: Worked end-to-end example applying this methodology to a concrete scenario.

example.title: PostgreSQL prod 3-2-1-1-0
example.code:
Workload: checkout-db (RDS Postgres, prod). RPO 1h, RTO 4h, retention 90d.
1. inventory → 1 RDS instance, 300 GB. 2. set-rpo-rto → RPO 1h (PITR), RTO 4h (cross-region restore). 3. choose-media → Copy 1: RDS automated snapshot (same region); Copy 2: snapshot copy to us-west-2 (offsite, mutable); Copy 3: pg_dump to S3 Object Lock COMPLIANCE bucket retention 90d (immutable). 4. schedule → snapshots q6h, pg_dump nightly, lifecycle prunes after 90d. 5. verify → nightly Lambda restores pg_dump to ephemeral RDS instance + runs `SELECT count(*)` on top tables; alert if mismatched.
Result: 3-2-1-1-0 satisfied. Last verification pass: today.
example.note: End-to-end trace through the 5-step procedure landing all 5 rules.
